Just as I thought, this is too many at once! I can't hold this much weight,
I'll have to make an emergency landing there!

I'm from Birdramon Transport Service. These strange
gates suddenly appeared all across the Digital World.

I got sucked into one of them and wound up here. I'll try getting
in touch with my comrades for now. You be careful, too.
Aegiomon... You look...
I think I can feel it inside me—a special power...
Now I'm... Aegiochusmon.
My wish to keep you safe... has filled me with strength.
It's the power of the Great Guardian.{next}
Yeah, no doubt!
I may have changed, but I'm still me.
I'm the same Aegiomon you rescued.
That means you can keep calling me "Aegiomon" like before.
...That's right!
It's the treasure from Junomon's throne!

It fell toward Nishi-Shinjuku. If the Titans get their hands
on it, we're in big trouble!
Junomon said we need to keep it safe from the Titans.

Well! It seems you made it back to the human world.
But you brought those hostile "Titans" with you.

What I don't understand is why there isn't any record
of this incident...
Make no mistake. This is an anomalous phenomenon.

But... this is precisely why our organization exists. For the 
honor of ADAMAS, you must nip this in the bud!
Give me the latest information on the enemy's movements.
They're approaching our location, and faster than expected!
No whining! We've been training to deal with situations like this!
Get into position!
Um, excuse us.
You three!

What are you doing here?! You can't be here right now!
Evacuate immediately!

This area is about to be closed off. Follow directions and get
yourselves to safety.
Closed off?! We can't stay in Shinjuku anymore?

Any area within a five-kilometer radius from the government building will be
closed off temporarily with an electromagnetic net. Present area included.
Now, please take evacuation measures at once.
No! We can't leave yet!
This is no time to evacuate!{next}
What do you mean by that?
I'm sorry... but we don't have time to explain!
Let's go. Aegiomon, {player}!
